features.description: RichTextBox exposes vertical scrolling across multi-page content, including documents loaded from DOCX.
Style-only run and paragraph definitions resolve into visible FlowDocument formatting (bold/italic and paragraph-level style effects).
Flow-compatible table features (row spans, cell borders, shading, padding, and alignment semantics) are preserved across import and export converters.
Flow block and paragraph keep/page-break/line-height visual semantics map into the shared document model.
Core flow roundtrip fixtures (core structures, nested lists, embedded markers) pass parity checks.
FlowDocument Block.BreakColumnBefore is available on the flow object model.
features.degradation: The shared document model has no dedicated column-break property, so converters preserve page-break semantics and explicitly degrade column-break intent.

features.description: DOCX floating shape anchor modes with wrap polygons and advanced relative positioning.
features.degradation: Advanced floating shape layout that cannot be represented by the current flow-compatible API is intentionally degraded.

features.description: DOCX typography options outside the flow-compatible text property surface.
features.degradation: Only flow-compatible typography properties are projected; unsupported OpenType-specific features are degraded.
